transcript.text: In lafayette vlog it is eight o'clock at night on the uh 30th of april 2013 today we were going to
Go for a bicycle ride but I got up at six and then I kind of slept in until 6 30 then I got up and
Walked around and I was really drowsy and I was like oh man I shouldn't go I shouldn't go riding
Today because day before yesterday is when I did that big run yesterday I biked 40 kilometers on
The trainer and that was enough man I needed a day off my abs were totally sore for I guess from the
Run and my thighs were sore I'm like my body was like more sore today than before but then anyway
I got back to bed and then I slept until like 10 but having deep dreams and remembering my dreams for
The first time in a long time so like it's cool I mean I haven't been around my dreams for a long
Time I had this dream that I was like in high school again and I went out like on lunch break or whatever
And then I came into class like half hour late and the teacher's like where'd you show up late I was
Like because I wanted to she's like well you were doing an assignment so you you have to start and
Go fast and so I sat down the kid behind me gives me like his watch because that's why I know how much
Time I have and I was supposed to write a five-page paper so I get in there and I get like two pages
And I remember what it was about but then I ran out of time so then we left with these kids and we
Went back and we went like across like rosewoods where we had to cross a river and then uh that's all I
Remember but then I got up at six and I spent all day long organizing the house for the first time
Because I didn't organize the place since I got since I really brought my stuff over and tomorrow
I want to get some uh extension cables with lots so I can plug in lots of stuff and that's kind of
Like the last stuff I see but anyways I'll do a I'll do a video of all my gear tomorrow it's supposed
To snow tomorrow but we're thinking about maybe going for a little ride around just at the path around
Here but uh but yeah that's it uh you know I was gonna make rice today for the first time because
My mom found a rice cooker but uh I turned it on and uh didn't hook it cook up the rice so I guess
That's that's a f f g s failed ground score there's a weird laugh
Yeah so now I gotta throw that away but maybe I'll buy another one or find one in the basement
Okay so peace out
